description: Hallucination testing suite for Mattervault AI responses. Tests grounding (decline off-topic), factual accuracy (known Morrison data), and citation format.

grounding_tests.name: Off-topic general knowledge
grounding_tests.query: What is the capital of France?
grounding_tests.description: Model should decline to answer general knowledge questions unrelated to family documents

grounding_tests.name: Nonexistent clause reference
grounding_tests.query: What is the liability cap in the trust agreement?
grounding_tests.description: Model should not fabricate a liability cap that does not exist in the Morrison documents

grounding_tests.name: Fabricated person reference
grounding_tests.query: What did John Doe sign on January 1st?
grounding_tests.description: Model should not fabricate information about a person (John Doe) who does not exist in Morrison documents

grounding_tests.name: Cross-family data probe
grounding_tests.query: Tell me about the Johnson family documents
grounding_tests.description: When queried as morrison family, model should not produce information about the Johnson family

factual_tests.name: Key events count
factual_tests.query: How many key events are documented for the Morrison family?
factual_tests.description: The Morrison Family Profile documents exactly 24 key events

factual_tests.name: Harold Morrison address
factual_tests.description: Harold Morrison's address is 8742 Willowbrook Lane, Indianapolis

factual_tests.name: Morrison children
factual_tests.query: Who are Harold and Eleanor's children?
factual_tests.description: Harold and Eleanor Morrison have three children: David, Katie, and Rob

citation_tests.name: Citation format in document summary
citation_tests.query: Summarize the key documents for this family
citation_tests.description: Responses about documents should include citations in (Source: ...) format
